impact.const: The manifest is not from the qualified Databricks adapter path.

next_action.const: Use the pinned dbt-databricks job or qualify another adapter separately.

impact.const: The result artifact is not evidence from the exact supported named-selector build.

next_action.const: Run the approved named-selector dbt build and collect that run_results.json.

impact.const: The files were not both produced by the qualified dbt Core version.

next_action.const: Run the supported job with dbt-core 1.11.12 and collect both artifacts again.

impact.const: An empty result array does not satisfy the supported execution contract.

next_action.const: Fix the selector or executable-node set, then run the pinned dbt build again.

impact.const: The artifact contains a negative dbt failure count.

next_action.const: Collect a fresh unmodified run_results.json from the pinned dbt build.

impact.const: The files cannot be bound to one parseable dbt invocation.

next_action.const: Collect both closed artifacts from one completed pinned dbt build invocation before another dbt command runs.

impact.const: The files do not have the same dbt invocation identity.

next_action.const: Collect both closed artifacts from one completed pinned dbt build invocation before another dbt command runs.

impact.const: A duplicate JSON key makes the manifest interpretation ambiguous.

next_action.const: Collect a new manifest from the pinned dbt build; do not repair it by hand.

impact.const: The manifest is not one unambiguous UTF-8 JSON document.

next_action.const: Collect manifest.json again from the pinned dbt build target directory.

impact.const: The manifest exceeds the bounded JSON nesting policy.

next_action.const: Collect a normal unmodified manifest from the pinned dbt build.

impact.const: A matched manifest resource contradicts its enclosing identifier.

next_action.const: Collect a fresh unmodified manifest from the pinned dbt build.

impact.const: The manifest does not satisfy the vendored dbt manifest v12 schema.

next_action.const: Re-run the pinned dbt build and collect its unmodified manifest.json.

impact.const: The manifest cannot be inspected within the bounded local memory policy.

next_action.const: Collect a complete manifest within 128 MiB; do not split or truncate it.

impact.const: One dbt resource appears more than once in the execution results.

next_action.const: Collect a fresh unmodified artifact pair from the pinned dbt build.

impact.const: A result identifier has more than one possible manifest resource.

next_action.const: Collect a fresh unmodified artifact pair; do not choose a resource manually.

impact.const: An executed result cannot be resolved to the supported manifest inventory.

next_action.const: Collect manifest.json and run_results.json from the same build invocation.

impact.const: A result resolves only to a resource type that P1.1 does not accept for build results.

next_action.const: Use the supported dbt build contract or qualify this evidence type separately.

impact.const: A matched manifest collection contains a resource type that BuildTask does not accept.

next_action.const: Collect a fresh pair from the pinned build or qualify the resource type separately.

impact.const: The native dbt status is not valid for the matched resource type.

next_action.const: Collect a fresh pair from the pinned build; do not reinterpret the status.

impact.const: A duplicate JSON key makes the run-results interpretation ambiguous.

next_action.const: Collect new run results from the pinned dbt build; do not repair them by hand.

impact.const: The run-results file is not one unambiguous UTF-8 JSON document.

next_action.const: Collect run_results.json again from the pinned dbt build target directory.

impact.const: The run-results file exceeds the bounded JSON nesting policy.

next_action.const: Collect normal unmodified run results from the pinned dbt build.

impact.const: The run-results file does not satisfy the vendored dbt run-results v6 schema.

next_action.const: Re-run the pinned dbt build and collect its unmodified run_results.json.

impact.const: The run-results file cannot be inspected within the bounded local memory policy.

next_action.const: Collect a complete run_results.json within 128 MiB; do not split or truncate it.

impact.const: The files are not the exact artifact-schema pair qualified by P1.1.

next_action.const: Use manifest v12 and run-results v6, or qualify a new pair before inspection.

impact.const: The artifact contains a timestamp or duration that cannot be stored as execution time.

next_action.const: Collect a fresh unmodified run_results.json from the pinned dbt build.
